nasb.text: When they came to the hill there, behold, a group of prophets met him; and the Spirit of God came upon him mightily, so that he prophesied among them.

esv.text: When they came to Gibeah, behold, a group of prophets met him, and the Spirit of God rushed upon him, and he prophesied among them.

cnv.text: 掃羅到了那山，有一班先知迎面而來。　神的靈大大感動他，他就在他們中間受感說話。

ccb.text: 扫罗和他的仆人来到上帝的山，遇见了一群先知。上帝的灵降在扫罗身上，他就和他们一起说起预言来。
